samples.gvd:
module multi_pipe_8bit
(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input mul_en_in,
    input mul_a,
    input mul_b,
    output mul_en_out,
    output mul_out
);
endmodule
samples.xml_description: Implement an unsigned 8bit multiplier based on pipelining processing. Clock. Active-low reset. Input enable bit for multiplication. Input multiplicand. Input multiplier. Output enable bit for multiplication. Output product. 8 Reset the internal registers. if (!rst_n) begin mul_en_out_reg = 0; mul_a_reg = 0; mul_b_reg = 0; sum = 0; mul_out_reg = 0; end Update the mul_en_out_reg with the mul_en_in signal. mul_en_out_reg[&N;] = mul_en_in; Update the mul_a_reg and mul_b_reg with the mul_a and mul_b. mul_a_reg[&N;] = mul_a; mul_b_reg[&N;] = mul_b; Generate the partial products based on the bits of the multiplier. assign temp[0] = mul_b_reg[0] ? mul_a_reg : 0; assign temp[1] = mul_b_reg[1] ? mul_a_reg : 0; assign temp[2] = mul_b_reg[2] ? mul_a_reg : 0; assign temp[3] = mul_b_reg[3] ? mul_a_reg : 0; assign temp[4] = mul_b_reg[4] ? mul_a_reg : 0; assign temp[5] = mul_b_reg[5] ? mul_a_reg : 0; assign temp[6] = mul_b_reg[6] ? mul_a_reg : 0; assign temp[7] = mul_b_reg[7] ? mul_a_reg : 0; Calculate the partial sum based on the generated partial products. always @(posedge clk) begin if (mul_en_out_reg) begin sum[0] = temp[0][7:0]; sum[1] = sum[0] + temp[1][7:0]; sum[2] = sum[1] + temp[2][7:0]; sum[3] = sum[2] + temp[3][7:0]; sum[4] = sum[3] + temp[4][7:0]; sum[5] = sum[4] + temp[5][7:0]; sum[6] = sum[5] + temp[6][7:0]; sum[7] = sum[6] + temp[7][7:0]; end end Calculate the final product based on the partial sum. always @(posedge clk) begin if (mul_en_out_reg) begin mul_out_reg = mul_out_reg + sum[7]; end end Assign the output based on the mul_en_out_reg signal. assign mul_out = mul_en_out_reg ? mul_out_reg : 0;
